---
title: "SEIR/SEIRS: Adding an Exposed State"
description: "Extends EpiModel's built-in SIR model by adding an Exposed compartment for latent infection, plus a SEIRS extension with waning immunity."
author: "Samuel M. Jenness"
date: "2018-08-01"
categories: [SEIR, SEIRS, exposed state, beginner]
order: 1
execute:
  eval: false
---

::: {.callout-warning}
## Under Construction
This example is being converted to an annotated Quarto document. In the meantime, you can download and run the standalone scripts:

- [model.R](model.R)
- [module-fx.R](module-fx.R)
:::
